programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy steps in to help Georgie with a new challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Georgie work to help a traumatized barrel-racing horse.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: A scattered marketing executive is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around. She finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: The Proposal Spot
programme.desc: The owner of a café where everyone falls in love could lose everything when a major celebrity proposes and gets dumped, so she vows to get him and his would-be fiancée back together, only to fall for him herself.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie führt ein Café gegenüber ihrer ehrgeizigen Cousine Marily, und beide wetteifern um das beste Café. Als Prinz Henry in die Stadt kommt, fordert er sie zu einem Wettbewerb um das legendäre Familienrezept ihrer Großmutter, um den perfekten Krönungskuchen für die Hochzeit seines Bruders zu backen. Während Allie fair bleibt, ist Marily bereit, zu schummeln, um zu gewinnen.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Mask Murder
programme.desc: When Jennifer buys a storage locker at auction, she discovers a dead body inside -- along with a mask matching the deceased woman.

programme.title: Been There All Along
programme.desc: After her public breakup, Charley, determined founder of a dating app, is near bankruptcy. She teams up with Liam, a self-assured and innovative marketing expert, to save her company.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: A Murder in Mind
programme.desc: Cookbook author Billie Blessings is excited when friend Katie Sanders appears as a guest host on her show, but being a TV star can't save Katie from falling under suspicion of murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: A Royal Recipe for Love
programme.desc: When Emma, a baker in NYC, is hired to bake for the king and queen of Sanovia's anniversary party, she is convinced a good job will lead to her landing a cookbook deal.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Mask Murder
programme.desc: When Jennifer buys a storage locker at auction, she discovers a dead body inside -- along with a mask matching the deceased woman.

programme.title: Been There All Along
programme.desc: After her public breakup, Charley, determined founder of a dating app, is near bankruptcy. She teams up with Liam, a self-assured and innovative marketing expert, to save her company.

programme.desc: Cookbook author Billie Blessings is excited when friend Katie Sanders appears as a guest host on her show, but being a TV star can't save Katie from falling under suspicion of murder.

programme.desc: An unexpected guest arrives which makes Amy and Jack question the reason behind the visit.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Mallory is forced to admit the real reason she returned to Heartland.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: When Tiffany's fiancé calls off their wedding, she's heartbroken that her dream wedding is cancelled. Tiffany convinces unsuccessful actor Nicholas to pretend to be her fiancé in exchange for signing him to her agency, and the dream wedding happens for someone.

programme.title: The Perfect Man(icure)
programme.desc: Quirky inventor Katya partners with charismatic marketing consultant Ryan to help sell her personal manicure device, Phenomenails, at the upcoming beauty expo.

programme.title: When Hope Calls: Brookfield
programme.desc: The Mounties track a dangerous criminal; Nora helps a child find something she lost; an opportunity for Hannah puts Wyatt in a tough spot.

programme.title: Chesapeake Shores
programme.desc: A fortune-telling machine shares uncomfortable truths with the O'Brien couples; Mick and Megan struggle with their long-distance relationship; Abby's more comfortable with her new romance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: An unexpected guest arrives which makes Amy and Jack question the reason behind the visit.

programme.desc: When Tiffany's fiancé calls off their wedding, she's heartbroken that her dream wedding is cancelled. Tiffany convinces unsuccessful actor Nicholas to pretend to be her fiancé in exchange for signing him to her agency, and the dream wedding happens for someone.

programme.desc: The Mounties track a dangerous criminal; Nora helps a child find something she lost; an opportunity for Hannah puts Wyatt in a tough spot.

programme.desc: A fortune-telling machine shares uncomfortable truths with the O'Brien couples; Mick and Megan struggle with their long-distance relationship; Abby's more comfortable with her new romance.

programme.title: Lease on Love
programme.desc: Poppy is a marketing specialist whose life is turned upside down when she fakes an engagement with her boss's handsome new client Milo, to win over her strict building manager and get Milo the penthouse suite.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Picture a Murder
programme.desc: Jenn gets the photos in an antique camera from the estate of a recently deceased and seemingly wealthy photography enthusiast printed, and one of the pictures leads her to believe that the man's death was anything but accidental.

programme.title: Sparks Over Brooklyn
programme.desc: Single mom and chef Lidia sees her dreams for the future falling apart when arrogant tech innovator Danny buys her beloved family restaurant with plans to turn it into a busy dining experience.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: The murder of a supermarket owner puts TV chef Billie Blessings and Detective Ian Jackson on the trail of a possible serial killer.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Candid About Love
programme.desc: Laura, a gallery assistant and wannabe fine art photographer, is finally promised a spot in a newcomer's showcase if she can get a reclusive artist, Shane, to premiere his newest photographs at the gallery.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Picture a Murder
programme.desc: Jenn gets the photos in an antique camera from the estate of a recently deceased and seemingly wealthy photography enthusiast printed, and one of the pictures leads her to believe that the man's death was anything but accidental.

programme.title: Sparks Over Brooklyn
programme.desc: Single mom and chef Lidia sees her dreams for the future falling apart when arrogant tech innovator Danny buys her beloved family restaurant with plans to turn it into a busy dining experience.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy has the feeling that something isn't right with Ty; Jack and Amy try to help the ghost horse.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack's secret could change his relationship with the family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Princess and the Bodyguard
programme.desc: On her 35th birthday, Lexi is told she must give up her normal life in New York City and take her rightful place as a royal princess. She has two weeks to come to terms with this, reveal her true identity to her best friend and find a suitable date for the royal gala, where she'll be introduced to the world. All under the watchful eye of her handsome, but infuriating, bodyguard Noah.

programme.title: The Date Whisperer
programme.desc: Date whispering is the hottest new trend in dating - a personal love coach right in your ear as you date your ideal match. And of all the date whisperers in LA, Sam is one of the best.

programme.title: Love in Focus
programme.desc: Jenna after finding out her hit show has been canceled, retreats to a mountain cabin where due to a mix up, must share it with a handsome nature photographer. After initially colliding they make the most of it and end up falling in love.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy has the feeling that something isn't right with Ty; Jack and Amy try to help the ghost horse.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack's secret could change his relationship with the family.

programme.title: The Princess and the Bodyguard
programme.desc: On her 35th birthday, Lexi is told she must give up her normal life in New York City and take her rightful place as a royal princess. She has two weeks to come to terms with this, reveal her true identity to her best friend and find a suitable date for the royal gala, where she'll be introduced to the world. All under the watchful eye of her handsome, but infuriating, bodyguard Noah.
